featuredText.title: Research Group on the Multiple Management of Forest Ecosystems - GIMEFOR.
featuredText.description: Since 1995, GIMEFOR has united a multidisciplinary team of specialists committed to conducting research and outreach activities.

aboutUs.mission: Our mission is to promote research, conservation, and sustainable use of forest ecosystems.
aboutUs.vision: To be a global reference in the research and sustainable management of forest ecosystems.
